tests.note: Unit tests created in index.test.ts with comprehensive Ralph Loop coverage: 13 test cases covering coverage score calculation, iteration progression, estimated remaining iterations, cancellation logic, and query refinement logic. Tests run in Supabase Edge Function environment (Deno).

lint.note: Lint passed for project files. Supabase Edge Functions ignored by ESLint and will be validated by Deno on deploy.

implementation: Implemented Ralph Loop pattern: Plan -> Search -> Synthesize -> Review -> Repeat
Coverage score calculation: starts at 1.8, increases by 0.8 per iteration, caps at 5.0
Completion threshold: coverage >= 4.0 OR max_iterations reached
Estimated remaining iterations calculated and streamed to client
Support for session cancellation with status update to 'cancelled'
Query refinement based on coverage gaps until coverage >= 4
Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming for real-time progress updates
Integration with deep_research_sessions and deep_research_iterations tables
Comprehensive error handling with try-catch blocks
JSDoc documentation with examples for all functions

acceptance_criteria.description: Execute Ralph Loop iterations with streaming progress
acceptance_criteria.note: Deno.serve serves HTTP requests, supports GET for session status and POST for starting iterations

acceptance_criteria.description: Calculate and stream coverage score, iteration number, estimated remaining
acceptance_criteria.note: Stream sends progress events with iteration_number, coverage_score, estimated_remaining

acceptance_criteria.description: Refine queries based on coverage gaps until coverage >= 4 OR max_iterations
acceptance_criteria.note: reviewFindings calculates coverage score, shouldRefineQueries returns false when coverage >= 4

acceptance_criteria.description: Support session cancellation with graceful shutdown
acceptance_criteria.note: checkCancellation queries session status, returns stop signal if cancelled or completed

patterns_followed: Server-Sent Events (SSE) pattern for real-time streaming
TypeScript strict mode with proper type definitions
Comprehensive error handling with user-friendly messages
Database operations using Supabase client with proper indexing
Consistent function naming and JSDoc documentation
Unit test coverage for all critical logic paths
